languages.text: Судя по разводам крови и сажи, тело волокли и сбросили с обрыва.

traits.locale_text: Судя по разводам крови и сажи, тело волокли и сбросили с обрыва.

languages.text: Judging by the blood and soot marks, the body was dragged and thrown off the cliff.
languages.original_text: Судя по разводам крови и сажи, тело волокли и сбросили с обрыва.

traits.locale_text: Judging by the blood and soot marks, the body was dragged and thrown off the cliff.
Judging by the blood and soot marks, the body was dragged and thrown off the cliff.
Judging by the blood and soot marks, the body was dragged and thrown off the cliff.

languages.text: Den Blut- und Rußspuren zufolge wurde die Leiche zur Klippe geschleift und in die Tiefe geworfen.
languages.original_text: Judging by the blood and soot marks, the body was dragged and thrown off the cliff.

traits.locale_text: Den Blut- und Rußspuren zufolge wurde die Leiche zur Klippe geschleift und in die Tiefe geworfen.

languages.text: 从血迹和烟灰痕迹来看，尸体被一路拖行后扔下了悬崖。
languages.original_text: Judging by the blood and soot marks, the body was dragged and thrown off the cliff.

traits.locale_text: 从血迹和烟灰痕迹来看，尸体被一路拖行后扔下了悬崖。

languages.text: Si l'on en croit les traces de sang et de suie, le corps a été traîné jusqu'à la falaise et poussé dans le vide.
languages.original_text: Judging by the blood and soot marks, the body was dragged and thrown off the cliff.

traits.locale_text: Si l'on en croit les traces de sang et de suie, le corps a été traîné jusqu'à la falaise et poussé dans le vide.

languages.text: A juzgar por la sangre y las manchas de hollín, el cadáver fue arrastrado y arrojado por el borde del precipicio.
languages.original_text: Judging by the blood and soot marks, the body was dragged and thrown off the cliff.

traits.locale_text: A juzgar por la sangre y las manchas de hollín, el cadáver fue arrastrado y arrojado por el borde del precipicio.

languages.text: Kan ve is izlerine bakılırsa ceset sürüklenmiş ve uçurumdan atılmış.
languages.original_text: Judging by the blood and soot marks, the body was dragged and thrown off the cliff.

traits.locale_text: Kan ve is izlerine bakılırsa ceset sürüklenmiş ve uçurumdan atılmış.

languages.text: 血痕と煤の跡から、遺体は引きずられて崖から投げ落とされたと判断できる。
languages.original_text: Judging by the blood and soot marks, the body was dragged and thrown off the cliff.

traits.locale_text: 血痕と煤の跡から、遺体は引きずられて崖から投げ落とされたと判断できる。
